description:

at night, under clear weather conditions, with a posted
speed limit of 55 mph or more; and encounters an animal
at a non-junction location.

a collision in which a vehicle travels forwards towards
a bicyclist crossing its path cycling from the farside and the frontal structure of the vehicle strikes
the bicyclist when no braking action is applied.

a collision in which a vehicle travels
forwards towards a bicyclist crossing its path cycling from the nearside from behind an obstruction
and the frontal structure of the vehicle strikes the bicyclist when no braking action is applied.

a collision in which a vehicle travels
forwards along a straight path across a junction, towards a vehicle crossing the junction on a
perpendicular path. The frontal structure of the vehicle under test strikes the side of the other
vehicle.

a collision in which a vehicle travels
forwards towards a child pedestrian crossing its path running from behind and obstruction from
the nearside and the frontal structure of the vehicle strikes the pedestrian when no braking action
is applied.

A vehicle equipped with an ADS feature is driving along a straight, undivided, multilane
highway. It approaches a school bus that is stopped in an opposing lane, with lights and signs
activated, to allow students to disembark.

scenario_id: Following Vehicle Approaching a Stopped Lead Vehicle
description:
Vehicle is going straight in an urban
area, in daylight, under clear weather conditions, at an
intersection-related location with a posted speed limit of
35 mph; and closes in on a stopped lead vehicle.

Vehicle is changing lanes or
passing in an urban area, in daylight, under clear
weather conditions, at a non-junction with a posted
speed limit of 55 mph; and closes in on a lead
vehicle.

A vehicle equipped with an ADS feature is driving along a straight urban street with multiple lanes. It is approaching a necessary turn and needs to change lanes to position itself in the appropriate lane to make the turn.

scenario_id: Vehicle Contacting Object with Prior Vehicle Maneuver
description:
Vehicle is leaving a parked position at night,
in an urban area, under clear weather conditions, at a non-
junction location with a posted speed limit of 25 mph; and
collides with an object on road shoulder or parking lane.

scenario_id: Vehicle Taking Evasive Action Without Prior Vehicle Maneuver

vehicle in a rural area, in daylight, under clear

Vehicle is going straight in a rural area, in
daylight, under clear weather conditions, at a non-junction
with a posted speed limit of 55 mph or more; and drifts and

Area: Urban
Road Topology: 4-way intersection
Description: I am traveling straight through a signalized urban intersection. A red adversary vehicle coming from the left is performing a left-hand turn, which intercepts my straight-line path in the middle of the junction. I must monitor this vehicle to avoid a collision as it enters my intended lane.

Area: Urban
Road Topology: 4-way intersection
Description: I am positioned at a large urban junction intending to perform a left turn. A red adversary vehicle is coming from the opposite direction and proceeding straight through the intersection. My left-turn trajectory intercepts the straight path of the oncoming car, requiring me to yield and time my turn safely.

Area: Urban / City Edge
Road Topology: Straight road
Description: I am driving straight on a multi-lane road near a railway. A red adversary vehicle in the lane to my right suddenly performs a cut-in maneuver, crossing into my lane directly in front of me. I must decelerate to maintain a safe following distance.

Area: Rural
Road Topology: 4-way intersection
Description: I am turning left at a rural junction surrounded by trees and farmland. Simultaneously, a red adversary vehicle from the opposite side is also performing a left turn. Our paths cross within the center of the intersection, necessitating careful coordination to avoid a side-swipe or head-on collision.

Area: Highly Urban
Road Topology: 4-way intersection
Description: I am attempting to navigate a complex, crowded intersection. Multiple adversaries are moving simultaneously: vehicles from the opposite side are turning left and going straight, while others from the side streets are entering the junction. My path intersects with several trajectories, including a red car turning left across my front and a green car coming straight.

Area: Urban
Road Topology: 4-way intersection
Description: I am making a left turn at a city intersection. A yellow adversary vehicle approaching from the opposite direction is going straight. This vehicle's path intercepts my turn, and there is a red vehicle following closely behind me. I must manage the gap with the oncoming yellow car to complete the turn safely.

Area: Urban
Road Topology: 4-way intersection
Description: I am proceeding straight through an intersection. A pink adversary vehicle from the cross-street on the left is attempting a left turn to merge into the road I am on. I need to be aware of this vehicle as its maneuver could lead it to intercept my lane or merge closely behind/ahead of me.

Area: Highway
Road Topology: Straight road
Description: I am driving in heavy traffic on a multi-lane highway. I am initiating a lane change to the left. I am surrounded by numerous adversaries in all lanes; I must find a sufficient gap in the left lane to merge without causing the vehicles behind or beside me to brake abruptly.

Area: Highway
Road Topology: On-ramp / Merge
Description: I am traveling on a highway on-ramp and need to merge into the main flow of traffic. Several adversaries (yellow, red, and green cars) are already established in the main highway lanes. I must accelerate to match their speed and merge into the flow of traffic without disrupting the existing vehicles.

Area: Highway
Road Topology: Straight road
Description: I am navigating through dense highway traffic and need to move toward the left-most lanes. This requires performing successive lane changes across multiple lanes of traffic. I must constantly monitor the positions and speeds of the many adversaries moving straight around me to execute these maneuvers safely.

Area: Rural
Road Topology: 4-way intersection
Description: I am approaching a junction on a two-lane road in a rural setting. I maneuver from my current position to go straight through the intersection. A red adversary vehicle is traveling parallel to me in the adjacent lane, also moving straight. I must maintain my lane integrity to avoid colliding with this side-by-side adversary.
